name: 青梅竹馬單相思情敵
description: 暗戀女主十年的竹馬回國，利用商業手段試圖拆散女主夫妻。衝突核心是「我比他先認識你」vs「我才是她選的人」。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: I've been into Goun for 10 years. Why'd this older guy get to her first? / Yen Yen, he's just some smalltime company boss. He can't give you happiness. / My husband is none of your business.
examples.context: 暗戀女主十年的竹馬回國，利用商業手段試圖拆散女主夫妻。衝突核心是「我比他先認識你」vs「我才是她選的人」。
